response.justification: Strong senior engineering background with deep open-source, Linux, and architecture experience across many stacks, plus founder experience running an open-source GIS platform. However, the role requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate reports only Basic German, which is a hard gap for a client-facing leadership role. Formal team-lead/Head-of-Development experience is also thin — mentoring is implied but no explicit reports or P&L/operational leadership of a team is documented.
strengths: 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and backend with strong open-source/Linux and DLang/Node.js depth
Founded and runs GISCollective, an open-source event-driven platform — demonstrates architecture and product ownership
Track record of teaching, workshops, and craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD) suitable for mentoring a small team
concerns: German only Basic vs. required C1 — likely disqualifying for client advisory work in DACH
No explicit formal leadership role (Head of / Tech Lead with direct reports, hiring, roadmap ownership)
UML and formal requirements-management experience not evidenced on the resume

key_factors.factor: Limited formal team leadership track record
